articles.author: Jane Switzer
articles.title: Can incoming CEO Heidi O’Neill breathe new life into Lululemon brand?
articles.description: Here's a look at incoming CEO Heidi O’Neill's long career with one of Lululemon’s rivals and what the market thinks of her hiring. Read more
